item.title: AI Developer Radar｜Daily｜2026-06-22 - Today's Summary
[sustained_hot] tw93/Pake (+2855 stars/24h)
item.description: Category: Other AI Description: 🤱🏻 Turn any webpage into a desktop app with one command. Why it matters: Other AI 方向保持持续热门，24h stars +2855，总 stars 55,863，适合看近期 release、commit 或社区讨论是否解释了增长。 Developer insight: 可以用一个最小样例验证 API、文档和集成成本，再决定是否纳入长期技术观察。 Risk: Low

item.title: [sustained_hot] chopratejas/headroom (+4534 stars/24h)
item.description: Category: Coding Agent / SWE Agent Description: Compress tool outputs, logs, files, and RAG chunks before they reach the LLM. 60-95% fewer tokens, same answers. Library, proxy, MCP server. Why it matters: Coding Agent / SWE Agent 方向保持持续热门，24h stars +4534，总 stars 43,694，适合看近期 release、commit 或社区讨论是否解释了增长。 Developer insight: 关注它如何拆解代码任务、接入工具和处理仓库上下文，可作为 coding agent 产品能力参考。 Risk: Low

item.title: [sustained_hot] Panniantong/Agent-Reach (+1492 stars/24h)
item.description: Category: MCP / Tool Calling Description: Agent Reach is a CLI tool that gives AI agents zero-config access to read and search Twitter, Reddit, YouTube, GitHub, Bilibili, Xiaohongshu, and more — all free, no API fees. Why it matters: The repo exploded from 31,787 stars with a 24h delta of +2,809 and a 7-day delta of +7,284. The acceleration ratio is 3.3 (high), indicating a sudden breakout. This is a massive spike in attention, likely driven by viral sharing in AI developer communities. Developer insight: This signals a shift toward 'capability layers' that abstract away the complexity of platform-specific access. Instead of each agent reinventing the wheel for web scraping, a shared open-source layer can handle authentication, backend selection, and fallback routing. This pattern may become standard for agent infrastructure. Risk: Low

item.title: [sustained_hot] DeusData/codebase-memory-mcp (+1647 stars/24h)
item.description: Category: MCP / Tool Calling Description: High-performance code intelligence MCP server. Indexes codebases into a persistent knowledge graph — average repo in milliseconds. 158 languages, sub-ms queries, 99% fewer tokens. Single static binary, zero dependencies. Why it matters: MCP / Tool Calling 方向保持持续热门，24h stars +1647，总 stars 10,062，适合看近期 release、commit 或社区讨论是否解释了增长。 Developer insight: 重点看协议适配、工具注册和真实示例，判断它是否能降低 agent 接工具的成本。 Risk: Low

item.title: [sustained_hot] mukul975/Anthropic-Cybersecurity-Skills (+6325 stars/24h)
item.description: Category: Coding Agent / SWE Agent Description: 754 structured cybersecurity skills for AI agents · Mapped to 5 frameworks: MITRE ATT&CK, NIST CSF 2.0, MITRE ATLAS, D3FEND & NIST AI RMF · agentskills.io standard · Works with Claude Code, GitHub Copilot, Codex CLI, Cursor, Gemini CLI & 20+ platforms · 26 security domains · Apache 2.0 Why it matters: Coding Agent / SWE Agent 方向保持持续热门，24h stars +6325，总 stars 17,460，适合看近期 release、commit 或社区讨论是否解释了增长。 Developer insight: 关注它如何拆解代码任务、接入工具和处理仓库上下文，可作为 coding agent 产品能力参考。 Risk: Low

item.title: [sudden_breakout] topoteretes/cognee (+619 stars/24h)
item.description: Category: AI Agent Framework Description: Cognee is the open-source AI memory platform for agents. Give your AI agents persistent long-term memory across sessions with a self-hosted knowledge graph engine. Why it matters: AI Agent Framework 方向出现突然加速：24h stars +619，前 3 日均值 23.3，加速度 26.5x，今天值得优先排查触发原因。 Developer insight: 可以用一个最小样例验证 API、文档和集成成本，再决定是否纳入长期技术观察。 Risk: Low

item.title: [sudden_breakout] ZhuLinsen/daily_stock_analysis (+1043 stars/24h)
item.description: Category: AI Agent Framework Description: LLM 驱动的多市场股票智能分析系统：多源行情、实时新闻、决策看板与自动推送，支持零成本定时运行。 LLM-powered multi-market stock analysis system with multi-source market data, real-time news, decision dashboard, automated notifications, and cost-free scheduled runs. Why it matters: AI Agent Framework 方向出现突然加速：24h stars +1043，前 3 日均值 127.7，加速度 8.2x，今天值得优先排查触发原因。 Developer insight: 可以用一个最小样例验证 API、文档和集成成本，再决定是否纳入长期技术观察。 Risk: Low

item.title: [sustained_hot] rohitg00/ai-engineering-from-scratch (+491 stars/24h)
item.description: Category: AI Agent Framework Description: A massive, free, open-source curriculum (503 lessons, 20 phases) that teaches AI engineering from math foundations to production agents, with every lesson producing a reusable artifact. Why it matters: With 32,318 stars, a 7-day average delta of 405 stars/day, and a 24-hour delta of 605 stars, this repo is experiencing sustained, high-velocity growth. The acceleration ratio of 1.9 indicates strong and consistent momentum, not a sudden spike. The project has attracted over 150,000 readers and 241,000 page views in the last 30 days, signaling broad community adoption. Developer insight: The project signals a growing demand for deep, foundational AI education that prioritizes understanding over speed. Developers are increasingly seeking resources that teach them to build from scratch, not just consume frameworks. The curriculum's emphasis on shipping artifacts also reflects a shift toward practical, portfolio-building learning. Risk: Low

item.title: [sustained_hot] addyosmani/agent-skills (+1196 stars/24h)
item.description: Category: AI Agent Framework Description: Production-grade engineering skills for AI coding agents. Why it matters: AI Agent Framework 方向保持持续热门，24h stars +1196，总 stars 64,664，适合看近期 release、commit 或社区讨论是否解释了增长。 Developer insight: 可以用一个最小样例验证 API、文档和集成成本，再决定是否纳入长期技术观察。 Risk: Low
